scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n main,chatbot,career-api,career-web,tasks -c blue,magenta,green,cyan,yellow "npm run dev" "npm run dev:chatbot" "npm run dev:career:backend" "npm run dev:career:frontend" "npm run dev:tasks"
scripts.dev:career:backend: cd career-guidance-system/backend && set PORT=5001 && python app.py
scripts.dev:tasks: cd task-management-system && set PORT=4000 && node --watch server.js
scripts.setup:all: npm install && npm install --prefix chatbot/backend && npm install --prefix task-management-system && npm install --prefix career-guidance-system/frontend && python -m pip install -r career-guidance-system/backend/requirements.txt
scripts.dev:checked: npm run smoke:local && npm run dev
